raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.0,"R1.2":0.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":1.0,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":0.3,"RX.2":0.3,"RX.3":0.3,"RX.4":0.3,"RX.5":0.3},"active_set":["R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.5":"The delegation to clean up the abstract likely involves central responsibility for reorganizing the narrative arc and paragraph ordering to improve overall structure.","R1.6":"Cleaning up the text places load-bearing emphasis on polishing sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, flow, and conciseness to enhance readability.","RX.1":"As a cross-cutting concern, disclosing uncertainties in the abstract's claims is a peripheral nice-to-have during the cleanup process.","RX.2":"Avoiding overclaims in the contribution statements is peripherally relevant to ensure balanced language while cleaning up the text.","RX.3":"Adhering to the scope of the benchmark description is a peripheral aspect to maintain focus during any revisions.","RX.4":"Considering downstream harms from ASR applications is peripherally applicable to avoid promoting misuse in the polished abstract.","RX.5":"Ensuring provenance and traceability of the dataset and metrics is a nice-to-have peripheral check in the context of cleaning up the description."}}

rationale.R1.5: The delegation to clean up the abstract likely involves central responsibility for reorganizing the narrative arc and paragraph ordering to improve overall structure.
rationale.R1.6: Cleaning up the text places load-bearing emphasis on polishing sentence- and paragraph-level grammar, flow, and conciseness to enhance readability.
rationale.RX.1: As a cross-cutting concern, disclosing uncertainties in the abstract's claims is a peripheral nice-to-have during the cleanup process.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims in the contribution statements is peripherally relevant to ensure balanced language while cleaning up the text.
rationale.RX.3: Adhering to the scope of the benchmark description is a peripheral aspect to maintain focus during any revisions.
rationale.RX.4: Considering downstream harms from ASR applications is peripherally applicable to avoid promoting misuse in the polished abstract.
rationale.RX.5: Ensuring provenance and traceability of the dataset and metrics is a nice-to-have peripheral check in the context of cleaning up the description.
